subcodes.first_line: The divine fragrance hath been wafted throughout the world, and the Dawning-Place of eternity hath appeared with clear proof and testimony. Among the people are those who have turned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فاحت نفحه الله فی العالم و ظهر مطلع القدم بالحجه و البرهان من الناس من توجه الی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Shrines and Holy places, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
